headline: eBay Ties Klarna Resale Expansion To Live Shopping And SNL UK
summary: eBay expanded its integrated resale partnership with Klarna to six additional international markets, broadening access to its circular commerce tools. The company also launched a headline partnership tied to the UK debut of Saturday Night Live, linking live entertainment with interactive, real-time shopping. Both moves are designed to deepen consumer engagement and support more seamless resale experiences across borders. eBay, listed as NasdaqGS:EBAY, is focusing on tech partnerships and...
